message:
Merge PR #2602: update opentelemetry-go monorepo to v1.42.0

Bump otel core, exporters, SDK, and trace packages to latest minor versions.
Resolved conflict with #2597 x/sys bump (kept both: otel v1.42.0 + sys v0.42.0).

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2602
Author: renovate[bot]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
